# Hyperswitch Control Center

> Open-source payments dashboard for the Hyperswitch payments switch by Juspay.

## Documentation

- [Agent Onboarding](AGENTS.md): Primary entry point for all AI coding agents
- [Claude Code Guide](CLAUDE.md): Claude Code-specific instructions and ReScript quick reference
- [README](README.md): Project overview and getting started
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## Source Entry Points

- [entryPoints/](src/entryPoints/): Application routing and auth entry
- [screens/](src/screens/): Page-level screen modules
- [components/](src/components/): Shared UI components
- [APIUtils/](src/APIUtils/): API communication layer
- [Recoils/](src/Recoils/): Global state atoms

## Agent Context

- [Memory Bank](memory-bank/): Architecture, patterns, and active context
- [Audit](AUDIT.md): Existing AI scaffolding inventory
- [AI Contributing Guide](docs/ai-contributing.md): Maintainer guide for AI scaffolding

## Optional

- [docs/](docs/): Additional documentation
